# Grave Locator

> A community-driven map for finding and recording grave locations.

Grave Locator lets visitors browse an interactive map of approved grave
locations and search for a deceased individual by name. Signed-in users can
pin a location on the map and submit grave details (name, birth/death
dates, an optional photo) for admin review; submissions appear on the
public map once approved.

This is a single-page web application: content (grave locations, names,
dates) is loaded dynamically from a database after the page loads and is
not present in the static HTML. Grave records are user-submitted and
admin-moderated, not an authoritative genealogical or cemetery-records
source.

## Key facts

- Purpose: locate and record physical grave locations on a map.
- Data: user-submitted, requires admin approval before appearing publicly.
- No public API; data is only available through the web interface.
